segments.text: We are departing from Chur, heading south through the Swiss Alps.
The Bernina line is one of the most spectacular railway routes in the world.
Reaching a summit of 2253 metres, it is the highest railway crossing in the Alps.

fullText: Welcome aboard the Bernina Express. We are departing from Chur, heading south through the Swiss Alps. The Bernina line is one of the most spectacular railway routes in the world. Reaching a summit of 2253 metres, it is the highest railway crossing in the Alps.
